LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: APPELLANTS CALIFORNIA SECURITY INSTITUTE, INC. AND VANCE WHARTON (AMENDED) MOTION TO RECONSIDER OCT 18, 2012 ORDER STRIKING LABOR APPEAL (NO BOND POSTED) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND PETITIONER HAS SHOWN GOOD CAUSE. PETITIONER SHALL POST AN UNDERTAKING OF $ 8,705.54 PER THE LABOR COMMISSION'S MODIFIED FINAL DECISION ISSUED ON OCTOBER 10, 2012, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 19, 2012 AT 4:00 PM, OR APPLY FOR A BOND WAIVER BY FILING A NOTICED MOTION, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 19, 2012 AT 4:00 PM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS UNOPPOSED. APPELLANT VANCE WHARTON'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER RELIEVING DEFENDANTS FROM OBLIGATION TO POST BOND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. INTERVENOR CALIFORNIA STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S DEMURRER TO NOTICE OF APPEAL IS OFF CALENDAR. Appeal withdrawn per stipulation and order dated February 4, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Application For Order Relieving Deft'S From Obligation To Post Bond
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Aleksandr A. Volkov, Esq. of the Law Office of Aleksandr A. Volkov, Tel. 415.987.7000, for appellant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was unopposed. APPELLANT VANCE WHARTON's Application For Order Relieving Defendants From Obligation To Post Bond is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Reconsider Oct 18, 2012 Order Striking Labor Appear No Bond Posted
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Aleksandr A. Volkov, Esq. of the Law Office of Aleksandr A. Volkov, Tel. 415.987.7000, for appellant and moving party;
No other appearance.

The Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: APPELLANTS CALIFORNIA SECURITY INSTITUTE, INC. and VANCE WHARTON (Amended) Motion To Reconsider Oct 18, 2012 Order Striking Labor Appeal (No Bond Posted) is granted. No opposition filed and Petitioner has shown good cause. Petitioner shall post an undertaking of $ 8,705.54 per the Labor Commission's modified final decision issued on October 10, 2012, no later than December 19, 2012 at 4:00 pm, or apply for a bond waiver by filing a noticed motion, no later than December 19, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

Ntc Of Motion To Reconsideration Oct 18,2012 Order Strikin Labor Appeal For No Bond Posted
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ALEKSANDR A VOLKOV, TEL. NO. 987-7000 APPEARING FOR THE APPELLANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. APPELLANTS CALIFORNIA SECURITY INSTITUTE, INC. and VANCE WHARTON'S Motion To Reconsideration of Oct. 18, 2012 Order Striking Labor Appeal For No Bond Posted - The matter is off calendar. The moving party shall re-calendar the matter before Judge Feinstein. She issued the order that moving party seeks reconsideration of. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

* * * Per Judge Feinstein this matter needs to be renoticed and be heard in Dept. 302 * * *
